_publications._publicationTitle: Bioluminescent imaging of intracranial vestibular schwannoma xenografts in NOD/SCID mice.

_contextSnippet: Overall, 8 (38%) of 21 mice showed engraftment demonstrated by stable or slightly increasing bioluminescent emissions up to 30 weeks after injection
details: 38% (8 of 21) mice showed successful schwannoma xenograft engraftment with stable or slightly increasing bioluminescent emissions up to 30 weeks after injection
